title: Proclamation No. 1819, s. 2009
text:
PROCLAMATION NO. 1819

AMENDING PROCLAMATION 449 SERIES OF 2003 WHICH RESERVED CERTAIN PARCELS OF LAND IN BARANGAY NANGALISAN, MUNICIPALITY OF TUBA, PROVINCE OF BENGUET, ISLAND OF LUZON FOR SCHOOL SITE PURPOSES OF TUBA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, BY GRANTING OWNERSHIP THEREOF IN FAVOR OF THE REPUBLIC OF THE PHILIPPINES – DEPARTMENT OF EDUCATION

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of the Department of Environment and Natural Resources and by virtue of the powers vested in me by law, I, GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO, President of the Republic of the Philippines, do hereby amend Proclamation No. 449 dated August 27, 2003 which withdrew from sale or settlement certain parcels of land of the public domain situated in Barangay Nangalisan, Municipality of Tuba, Province of Benguet and reserved the same as school site for Tuba National High School by granting ownership thereof in favor of the Republic of the Philippines-Department of Education, subject to prior rights, if any there be, which parcels of land are more particularly described as follows;

“Lot No. 1, Psu-88651 Amd.

Tuba National High School

A parcel of land (Lot No. 1, Psu-88651 amd.) situated in Barangay Nangalisan, Municipality of Tuba, Province of Benguet, Island of Luzon.

Bounded on the E., and SE., along line 1-2 by Lot 2, Psu-88651 Amd. Portion of a Provinsial road; on the S., along line 2-3 by Lot 2, Psu-88650 claimed by Antonio Cachero; on the SW., along line 3-4 Lipay River (50 M. wide); on the W., & NW., along line 4-1 by the property of Juan Doctolero.

Beginning at a point marked “1” on the plan being S. 88-07’E., 1708 m. from B.L.B.M. #2, Bo. of Galiano, Municipality of Aringay, thence:

S. 13-14’W.,

157.97 m. to point 2;

N. 79-23’W.,

22.68 m. to point 3;

N. 21-21’E.,

40.00 m. to point 4;

N. 21-21’E.,

120.60 m. to point of

beginning. Containing an area of ONE THOUSAND SEVEN HUNDRED EIGHTY NINE (1,789) SQUARE METERS, more or less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and are marked on the ground as follows: Points as follows: Point 1 by “x”k and all corners not otherwise described are PS Cyl. Conc. Mons. 15 x cms. Bearings: true. Date of survey on august 2, 2000, executed by Igme S. Wakat and was approved on September 12, 2001.”

“Lot No. 3, Psu-88651 Amd.

Tuba National High School

A parcel of land (Lot No. 3, Psu-88652 Amd.) situated in Barangay Nangalisan, Municipality of Tuba, Province of Benguet, Island of Luzon.

Bounded on the N., along line 1-2 by the property of Dolo (Infiel); on the E., along lines 2-3-4 by Lot 4, Psu-88651 Amd.; on the SE., along line 4-5 by the property of Julian Sabado; on the S., along line 5-6 by Lot 2, Psu-88650 claimed by Antonio Cachero; on the W., and NW., along line 6-1 by Lot 2, Psu-88651 Amd. Portion of provincial road.

Beginning at a point marked “1” on the plan being S. 88-06’E., 1728.00 m. from B.L.B.M. # 2, Bo. of Galiano, Municipality of Aringay, thence:

S. 87-09’E.,

55.59 m. to point 2;

S. 16-28’W.,

92.47 m. to point 3;

S. 36-23’E.,

93.22 m. to point 4;

S. 09-31’E.,

13.25 m. to point 5;

N. 79-23’W.,

125.40 m. to point 6;

N. 13-08’E.,

160.66 m. to point of

beginning, containing an area of ELEVEN THOUSAND FIVE HUNDRED FIVE (11,505) SQUARE METERS, more or less. All points referred to are indicated on plan and are marked on the ground as follows: Point 5 by “x” on rock and all corners not otherwise described are PS Cyl. Conc. Monc. 15 x 40 cms. Bearings: true. Date of survey on August 2, 2000, executed by Igme S. Wakat and was approved on September 12, 2001.”

The tract or tracts of land reserved under the provisions of Section Eighty-Eight shall be non-alienable and shall not be subject to occupation, entry, sale, lease or other disposition until again declared alienable under the provisions of this Act or by Proclamation of the President.

The area covered by the herein proclamation shall be under the administrative jurisdiction, supervision, and control of the Department of Education (DepEd).

The Secretary of the Department of Environment and Natural Resources is hereby authorized to issue the corresponding special patent in favor of the Republic of Philippines – Department of Education.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

DONE in the City of Manila this 30 th day of June, in the year of Our Lord Two Thousand and Nine.

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

By the President:

Executive Secretary
